summary: Classified hybrid specimen — Mutadon. Late-stage InGen program asset with chimeric traits across multiple theropod and amphibian gene donors.
facts: Morphology may shift between growth stages — phenotype not fixed.
Enhanced regenerative markers detected in tissue samples.
Final embryo in the recovery sequence; extraction triggers mission closeout.
Location data restricted to authorized field terminal operators.
fieldNotes: Final specimen. Complete recovery before initiating island extraction protocol.
